task: Synthesize feedback themes from these GitHub issues

signals.title: Atlas orchestrator hangs when Sage times out on large repos
signals.body: I pointed Sage at a repo with 2000+ issues and Atlas just hung forever. No timeout, no retry. Had to kill the process manually. This is the second time I'm reporting this.
signals.author: frustrated_dev

signals.title: Add support for Slack as a monitoring channel for Echo
signals.body: Echo only monitors Reddit, HN, and Twitter/X. Would love to add Slack community channels as a signal source.
signals.author: slack_fan

signals.title: Docs are outdated for MCP tool registration
signals.body: The MCP server docs reference a register_tool() method that was renamed to _register_tools(). Spent 2 hours debugging why my custom tool didn't appear.
signals.author: new_user_42

signals.title: Atlas hangs on Monday cycle when GitHub API rate-limited
signals.body: Same hang as #87. Sage gets rate-limited, Atlas has no timeout. Running against a popular repo with 500+ weekly issues.
signals.author: apple_dev

signals.title: How to add a custom agent to the weekly cycle?
signals.body: I can't find any documentation on creating a new specialist agent and registering it with Atlas. The README mentions it's possible but there's no guide.
signals.author: plugin_builder

signals.title: SharedContext grows unbounded with 50+ weekly cycles
signals.body: After running the system for 50 weeks, the SharedContext JSON dump is 200MB. Memory usage spikes to 8GB on Friday compilation. We're evaluating for our DevRel team of 6.
signals.author: enterprise_eval

signals.title: Love the new prompt optimization scoring!
signals.body: Just tested the iteration loop where Nova suggests prompt tweaks and Iris re-scores. Works beautifully. Agent accuracy went from 72 to 89. Great work team!
signals.author: happy_user

signals.title: Knowledge base indexing fails silently on non-UTF8 files
signals.body: When Kai tries to index a knowledge base with binary files mixed in, nothing happens. No error, no warning. Just skips files without telling you which ones.
signals.author: confused_dev

signals.title: First-time setup requires 6 API keys before anything works
signals.body: The getting started guide asks for ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN, POSTHOG_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, and POSTHOG_PROJECT_ID before you can even run one agent. Can we get a minimal quickstart with just the Anthropic key?
signals.author: impatient_dev

signals.title: Confused by agent vs tool vs MCP server terminology
signals.body: What's the difference between an agent, a tool, and an MCP server? Sage is an agent that uses github_tools which is exposed through mcp_server? The docs use these concepts loosely.
signals.author: terminology_confused

signals.title: Weekly cycle fails on Windows due to path handling
signals.body: knowledge_base rglob fails on Windows because of backslash paths. Had to switch to WSL to run Atlas.
signals.author: windows_user

signals.title: Need multi-product support in single Atlas instance
signals.body: We want to run OpenClaw for 3 different products (PostHog, our internal SDK, and our open-source CLI). Currently everything assumes one product per deployment.
signals.author: enterprise_arch

signals.title: Memory leak in long-running Celery worker for scheduled cycles
signals.body: When running Atlas as a background service, memory grows continuously. Have to restart every 4 days. Running full 10-agent weekly cycles.
signals.author: ops_engineer

signals.title: No audit trail for agent decisions
signals.body: For our DevRel manager review process we need an audit log of what each agent decided and why. Currently SharedContext only stores final outputs, not reasoning traces.
signals.author: compliance_lead
